summary: B2B Section Full Testing - All 9 B2B pages tested (/partners + 8 dedicated pages). All critical SEO and functionality requirements PASS. Each page has unique title, unique H1, unique meta description, B2B contact form, canonical URL, hreflang tags (en, fr, ru, x-default), JSON-LD structured data, and proper OG tags.

critical_code_review_comments: B2BPage.js reusable component properly renders all SEO elements for dedicated pages
Partners.js main page correctly links to all 8 dedicated target pages via targets array
All pages use data-testid attributes for robust automated testing
Hreflang tags correctly include x-default for language variants
JSON-LD Service schema properly configured with provider organization
sitemap.xml updated to include all 9 B2B pages with correct priority (0.8-0.9)

mocked_api.b2b_contact_form: Form submission is mocked (preventDefault only) - does not submit to backend

context_for_next_testing_agent: B2B section complete with all 9 pages tested. All pages have unique SEO elements, B2B contact forms, proper internal linking, and are included in sitemap.xml. Form submission is MOCKED. Design uses dark premium theme (#0c1220 bg) with green accent (#2ecc71). Content is available in 3 languages (en, fr, ru).
